body: Lena, thanks for the thoughtful note — really appreciated your perspective on the [Initialized Capital](initialized-capital) portfolio dynamics heading into the back half of the year. I've been thinking a lot about what you said regarding compression in seed valuations, and honestly I think it creates a genuinely interesting window for the kind of climate infrastructure deals we've been tracking at [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital). A few of the founders we met at the Carbon Unbound summit last month are starting to move faster than I expected, so the timing feels right to compare notes. Would love to grab 30 minutes sometime next week if you're open — I can share what we're seeing on the AI infrastructure side as well, since there's more overlap with climate compute than most people realize. Let me know what works.
